title: Remember Pearl Harbor
writer: Malcolm Stuart Boylan, Isabel Dawn, Jack Natteford
actors: Don 'Red' Barry, Alan Curtis, Fay McKenzie
plot: On 16 November, 1941 at the La Dessa U. S. army post in the Philippines, a Japanese carrier ship off the coast transmits a coded message to the contraband radio of Nazi spies. The spies then stick the message, which states that a ...
